features: 【Food Grade Material】Double head floss picks are made of food-grade plastic. Braces flossers are safe and harmless to the body, and toothpicks can be used with confidence; flossers for braces are smooth and burr-free and will not harm the gums; plastic toothpicks are soft and comfortable, durable and not easy to break

【Double-Headed Design】Floss sticks for adults adopt a double-headed design, interdental brush and toothpick in one. The double head dental pick braces cleaner has a conical shape on one end with small soft bristles, and a textured fishbone brush on the other end. Oral care toothpicks effectively remove food particles and debris

【Maintain Oral Hygiene】Tooth picks flossers can clean and remove dirt between teeth that ordinary toothbrushes cannot reach without harming the gums. Plastic toothpicks for teeth can also clean hard-to-reach places such as braces and permanent retainers, and soft teeth picks are an effective tool for maintaining oral hygiene

【Easy to use】Toothpicks floss picks are easy to use, and teeth cleaning tools are placed in the box and ready for use. Plackers dental flossers can easily clean teeth by moving them back and forth; disposable interdental brushes can be thrown away after use, convenient and clean

【What you will get】You will get 5 boxes of braces toothbrush, each box is 100pcs. Orthodontic flossers for braces are available in pink, blue, white, green and orange. The small case easy to carry around, dental picks for teeth cleaning are perfect for popping into your makeup bag, purse, suitcase or car
description: Product description Ptwola 500pcs Double Head Dental Floss Interdental Brush 2-in-1, Disposable Plastic Multicolor Dental Pick Braces Cleaner Brush Oral Care Toothpicks (5 Pack, 100pcs/Box) Category: Dental floss brush Color: pink+blue+white+green+orange Material: Plastic Function: fishbone toothpick brush, double-ended plastic toothpick for picking toothpicks Product size: 2.76 × 1.38 × 0.79 inches / 7 × 3.5 × 2 cm (size of one box) Dental floss length 6.4cm / 2.52inches Packaging: Bag Packing list: 500pcs × dental floss brush (5 boxes, 100 pieces per box) Directions Use by moving back and forth and discard after use. Safety Warning Warning: not suitable for children. Avoid swallowing the product. See more
